gui.dragonminez.character_stats.title: STATISTICS
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.str.desc: §7Increases your melee damage. At more damage, more Stamina you will spend.
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.res.desc: §7Increases you maximum Stamina and reduces the damage you take from enemies.
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.pwr.desc: §7Increases your Ki Damage. At more damage, more Ki you will spend.
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.melee_da: The damage you deal to enemies with your melee attacks.
Increasing Strength increases this value by %s per point
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.strike_d: Increasing Strike Power increases this value by %s per point
Increasing Resistance increases this value by %s per point
The damage you nullify from enemies.
Increasing Resistance increases this value by %s per point
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.health.t: Increasing Vitality increases this value by %s per point
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.ki_damag: The damage you deal to enemies with your Ki Attacks.
Increasing Ki Power increases this value by %s per point
gui.dragonminez.character_stats.max_ener: Increasing Energy increases this value by %s per point

gui.dragonminez.party.start_requirements: All party members must meet the start requirements.

gui.dragonminez.training.title: Training
gui.dragonminez.spacepod.title: Space Pod
gui.dragonminez.lines.karin.name: Master Korin
gui.dragonminez.lines.karin.main: Welcome to Korin Tower, %s! Train hard and you will become stronger! Do you need anything from me?
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.name: Elder Guru
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.main: Greetings %s, I am Elder Guru, the wise leader of the Namekians. May I assist you in your journey?
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.evil: You have become too evil. I will not help you unlock your Potential. Get out of my sight!
gui.dragonminez.lines.guru.level: You need to have your Potential Unlock skill at level 10 to unlock your Potential further.
gui.dragonminez.lines.dende.name: Dende
gui.dragonminez.lines.dende.main: Hello %s, I am Dende, the Guardian of Earth. How can I assist you today?
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.name: King Yemma
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.main: Welcome to the Otherworld, %s. I am King Yemma, the overseer of souls. Do you want to come back to Earth?
gui.dragonminez.lines.enma.revive: You need to talk to Fortuneteller Baba to be revived first!
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.name: Fortuneteller Baba
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.main: Greetings %s, I am Fortuneteller Baba. I can help you return to the world of the living. You need to wait %d more seconds before being able to revive.
gui.dragonminez.lines.baba.revived: §dFortuneteller Baba§r: You have been revived! Go back to §eKing Yemma§r to return to Earth.
gui.dragonminez.lines.popo.name: Mr Popo
gui.dragonminez.lines.popo.main: Welcome back to Kami's Lookout, %s. Can I help you with something? Maybe do you want to train or change your haircut?
gui.dragonminez.lines.popo.training: So you want to train, right? I can summon you a dummy, or we can practice your reflexes with a rhythm game. What do you choose?
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.name: Dr. Gero
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.main: Ah, a new test subject! I am Dr. Gero, the greatest scientific mind in the universe. The only one left of the Red Ribbon Army. I can offer you a unique opportunity...
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.offer: I can convert you into an android, granting you immense power and unique abilities. However, this process comes with its own risks.
gui.dragonminez.lines.gero.confirm: Are you sure? This process is irreversible and you'll lose access to your old transformations, however, you'll gain access to a new world of power!
gui.dragonminez.lines.toribot.name: Toribot
gui.dragonminez.lines.toribot.main: Beep boop! I am Toribot, thanks for visiting me! It's kinda lonely here with King Kai...
gui.dragonminez.lines.generic.createchar: You need to create your character first.

wish.shenron.materials.desc: Receive 32 Kikono Shards and 64 Iron Ingots.

wish.shenron.racialskillreset.name: Reset Passive
wish.shenron.racialskillreset.desc: Resets the player's Racial Passive Skill. This only applies to Saiyans, Namekians and Majin
wish.shenron.customization.name: Re-Customize Character
wish.shenron.customization.desc: Allows you to change your character's appearance and class but not Race. This will not reset your stats or skills.
wish.porunga.senzu.name: Senzu Beans
wish.porunga.tps.name: Training Points
wish.porunga.materials.name: Armor Materials
wish.porunga.materials.desc: Receive 64 Kikono Shards and 128 Iron Ingots.
wish.porunga.invincible.name: Invincible Armor
wish.porunga.invincible_blue.name: Invincible Armor (Blue)
wish.porunga.bravesword.name: Brave Sword
wish.porunga.pothala_yellow.name: Potara Earrings (Yellow)
wish.porunga.pothala_yellow.desc: Receive a pair of Yellow Potara Earrings.
wish.porunga.pothala_green.name: Potara Earrings (Green)
wish.porunga.pothala_green.desc: Receive a pair of Green Potara Earrings.
wish.porunga.racialskillreset.name: Reset Passive
wish.porunga.racialskillreset.desc: Resets the player's Racial Passive Skill. This only applies to Saiyans, Namekians and Majin
wish.porunga.customization.name: Re-Customize Character
wish.porunga.customization.desc: Allows you to change your character's appearance and class but not Race. This will not reset your stats or skills.
race.dragonminez.human.desc: They are a terrestrial race with highly versatile combat skills. While they lack the innate power of other races, they are incredibly resourceful and tenacious. They stand out for their perseverance and courage, able to overcome their limitations through training and discipline.
race.dragonminez.saiyan.desc: They are a warrior race born for combat. Their innate ability to grow stronger after each battle makes them formidable opponents. They can even transform into powerful Super Saiyans and take their abilities to unimaginable levels.
race.dragonminez.namekian.desc: They are a peaceful yet powerful race, with great regenerative abilities and a natural connection to magic and nature. They are known for their wisdom, energy control, and their ability to fuse with others of their kind, increasing their power.
race.dragonminez.frostdemon.desc: They are a race of intergalactic conquerors with immense power and boundless cruelty. Their ability to transform and increase their power makes them formidable enemies. Despite their fragile appearance, they are some of the deadliest creatures in the universe.
race.dragonminez.bioandroid.desc: They are artificially created beings, combining the DNA of the most powerful races. With the ability to absorb other beings and increase their power to unimaginable levels, these creatures are adaptable and dangerous, designed to be invincible.
race.dragonminez.majin.desc: They are a magical and unpredictable race with enormous destructive potential, with a unique ability to regenerate and change form. Though they may seem playful or childish, they are extremely dangerous when they unleash their true power.
message.dragonminez.form.no_ki_instant: §cYou need at least %s §cKi to transform instantly.
message.dragonminez.form.no_stamina_inst: §cYou need at least %s §cStamina to transform instantly.
message.dragonminez.form.no_health_insta: §cYou need at least %s §cHP to transform instantly.
message.dragonminez.form.stack_removed: §cYour stack form has been removed, you cannot stack it with this form.
message.dragonminez.form.not_stackable: §cThis form cannot be stacked with your current stack form.
message.dragonminez.quest.start.unavaila: This quest cannot be started right now.
message.dragonminez.quest.start.already_: This quest is already active or completed.
message.dragonminez.quest.start.locked: You do not meet the requirements for this quest yet.
message.dragonminez.quest.start.party_me: %s has not met the requirement to start this quest: %s
message.dragonminez.racial.target_too_st: §cThe target is too strong to be absorbed or assimilated.
message.dragonminez.racial.limit_reached: §cYou have reached the limit of absorptions.
message.dragonminez.fusion.different_rac: §cYou can only fuse (Metamoru) with players of the same race.
message.dragonminez.fusion.level_gap: §cYou can only fuse (Metamoru) with a player similar in level to you.
message.dragonminez.gero.not_human: §cDr. Gero§r: Only certain races can undergo android conversion.
message.dragonminez.gero.already_android: §cDr. Gero§r: You have already been converted to an android.
message.dragonminez.gero.upgrade_success: §cDr. Gero: §rAndroid conversion complete! Now let your power run wild!

item.dragonminez.brave_sword.tooltip: A sword wielded by a brave warrior. It is said to be able to cut through anything.
item.dragonminez.power_pole.tooltip: A magical staff that can extend to great lengths.

dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.ros: Ah, a new student! I have some training for you... Are you ready?
Keep training, you're not done yet!
Well done! You've completed the training. Here's your reward!
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.gok: Hey! I've got a challenge for you. Wanna try it?
Amazing! You did great! Here, you've earned this!
Hey there! Come fight with me sometime!
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.bul: I need some help with a project. Can you gather some materials for me?
Have you found what I need yet?
Perfect! Just what I needed. Thank you!
I'm working on something big... come back later.
dialogue.dragonminez.story.sidequest.gen: I could use your help with something...
How's it going with that task?
Thank you so much for your help!

dmz.quest.saiyan1.name: Find Master Roshi
dmz.quest.saiyan1.desc: Track down Kame House and meet Master Roshi to begin your training.
dmz.quest.saiyan2.name: Train with Krillin
dmz.quest.saiyan2.desc: Spar with Krillin at Kame House and prove you can keep up with Roshi's training.
dmz.quest.saiyan3.name: Defend Gohan
dmz.quest.saiyan3.desc: Raditz has appeared in the plains. Defeat him and protect Gohan from the invading Saiyan.
dmz.quest.saiyan4.name: Train with Gohan
dmz.quest.saiyan4.desc: Gohan's survival training has begun. Hunt a dinosaur in the plains and help him endure the wilderness.
dmz.quest.saiyan5.name: Craft the Dragon Radar
dmz.quest.saiyan5.desc: Stay on Earth long enough for Bulma to finish the Dragon Radar, then bring the device to her.
dmz.quest.saiyan6.name: Kill the Saibamen
dmz.quest.saiyan6.desc: The Saiyan invasion has begun. Wipe out the Saibamen before Nappa and Vegeta take over the battlefield.
dmz.quest.saiyan7.name: Hold Against Nappa
dmz.quest.saiyan7.desc: Nappa is tearing through the plains. Hold the line and bring him down.
dmz.quest.saiyan8.name: Face Vegeta
dmz.quest.saiyan8.desc: With Nappa gone, the Saiyan prince steps in. Hunt Vegeta through the rocky battlefield and challenge him directly.
dmz.quest.saiyan9.name: Defeat Oozaru Vegeta
dmz.quest.saiyan9.desc: Vegeta transformed into a Great Ape. Finish the fight before the giant crushes Earth.
dmz.quest.saiyan10.name: Feast with the Others
dmz.quest.saiyan10.desc: The battle is over for now. Return to Kame House and regroup with the others.
dmz.quest.saiyan11.name: Fix the Saiyan Ship
dmz.quest.saiyan11.desc: Bulma has almost finished the ship to Namek. Speak with her once the repairs are ready.
dmz.quest.saiyan12.name: Head to Namek
dmz.quest.saiyan12.desc: The next battle lies on Namek. Reach the required power and travel there.
dmz.quest.frieza1.name: Landing on Namek
dmz.quest.frieza1.desc: You've reached Namek, but Frieza's patrols already control the Ajissa Plains. Secure a foothold before the real battles begin.
dmz.quest.frieza2.name: Cui's Pursuit
dmz.quest.frieza2.desc: Cui has tracked the resistance to Namek. Drop him before he can report back to Frieza.
dmz.quest.frieza3.name: The Namekian Village
dmz.quest.frieza3.desc: A nearby Namekian settlement is still holding out. Find the village and see what remains.
dmz.quest.frieza4.name: Defend the Namekians
dmz.quest.frieza4.desc: Frieza's army is raiding the village. Hold the line and protect the Namekians from the assault.
dmz.quest.frieza6.name: The Cruel Dodoria
dmz.quest.frieza6.desc: Dodoria is sweeping the Ajissa Plains and leaving nothing behind. Hunt him down and end the massacre.
dmz.quest.frieza7.name: Zarbon's True Form
dmz.quest.frieza7.desc: Zarbon's elegance hides a far uglier power. Survive his transformation and finish the fight.
dmz.quest.frieza9.name: The Saiyan Prince
dmz.quest.frieza9.desc: Vegeta is carving his own path across Namek in search of power. Confront the prince before he gets ahead of everyone else.
dmz.quest.frieza10.name: Ginyu Force: Guldo
dmz.quest.frieza10.desc: The Ginyu Force has landed. Start by crushing Guldo before the squad overwhelms the battlefield.
dmz.quest.frieza11.name: Recoome's Rampage
dmz.quest.frieza11.desc: Recoome is all power and no restraint. Stop him before the entire front collapses.
dmz.quest.frieza12.name: Burter and Jeice
dmz.quest.frieza12.desc: Burter and Jeice are fighting as a pair. Break the duo before Captain Ginyu joins the battle himself.
dmz.quest.frieza14.name: Captain Ginyu
dmz.quest.frieza14.desc: Captain Ginyu has entered the fight. Take down the leader of the Ginyu Force before his tricks turn the battle upside down.
dmz.quest.frieza15.name: Body Change Chaos
dmz.quest.frieza15.desc: Ginyu has stolen Goku's body and turned the battlefield into chaos. End the confusion before Frieza arrives.
dmz.quest.frieza16.name: Repel Frieza's Forces
dmz.quest.frieza16.desc: Even after the Ginyu Force falls, Frieza's soldiers keep pressing the attack. Clear the remaining troops.
dmz.quest.frieza17.name: Frieza, First Form
dmz.quest.frieza17.desc: The tyrant himself has finally entered the battle. Stand against Frieza's first form and survive the opening clash.
dmz.quest.frieza18.name: Frieza's Rising Horror
dmz.quest.frieza18.desc: Frieza refuses to stay in one shape. Survive his escalating second and third forms before he reaches his true body.
dmz.quest.frieza20.name: Final Form Frieza
dmz.quest.frieza20.desc: Frieza's final form is deceptively calm and infinitely more dangerous. Fight through the terror and force him back.
dmz.quest.frieza21.name: 100% Full Power
dmz.quest.frieza21.desc: Frieza is done holding back. Face his full power and end the fight before Namek dies with him.
dmz.quest.frieza22.name: Escape the Collapsing World
dmz.quest.frieza22.desc: Namek is collapsing around you. Get out before the planet takes everyone down with it.
dmz.quest.android1.name: Frieza's Return
dmz.quest.android1.desc: A surviving strike team has reached Earth ahead of their leaders. Clear the scouts before the real invasion lands.
dmz.quest.android2.name: Mecha Frieza
dmz.quest.android2.desc: Frieza has returned as a machine-built monster. Stop him before Earth repeats Namek's fate.
dmz.quest.android3.name: King Cold
dmz.quest.android3.desc: King Cold has stepped onto the battlefield himself. Bring down the emperor before his rule reaches Earth.
dmz.quest.android4.name: Future Trunks
dmz.quest.android4.desc: A mysterious swordsman has already changed the course of history. Test the warrior who came from the future.
dmz.quest.android5.name: Goku's Home
dmz.quest.android5.desc: The next threat will not arrive immediately. Visit Goku's home and prepare for the years ahead.
dmz.quest.android6.name: Three Years of Preparation
dmz.quest.android6.desc: The Androids are still coming. Spend the waiting period training until your body is ready for what Trunks warned about.
dmz.quest.android7.name: Android 19
dmz.quest.android7.desc: The first android drains energy from anyone careless enough to fight head-on. Take 19 down fast.
dmz.quest.android8.name: Dr. Gero
dmz.quest.android8.desc: The creator of the Androids is on the move. Stop Dr. Gero before he can unleash something worse.
dmz.quest.android9.name: Track the Androids
dmz.quest.android9.desc: Androids 17 and 18 vanished into the mountains. Search the range and find their trail.
dmz.quest.android10.name: Android 17
dmz.quest.android10.desc: Android 17 is reckless, cruel, and stronger than expected. Bring him down before he tears through the world.
dmz.quest.android11.name: Android 18
dmz.quest.android11.desc: Android 18 fights with the same cold confidence as 17. Beat her before the pair can regroup.
dmz.quest.android12.name: Android 16
dmz.quest.android12.desc: The silent giant is finally moving. Test your strength against Android 16 in the open plains.
dmz.quest.android13.name: A New Monster
dmz.quest.android13.desc: Before the Android threat settles, a new bio-android starts hunting people in the plains. Investigate the reports.
dmz.quest.android14.name: Fusion of Warriors
dmz.quest.android14.desc: Piccolo has fused with Kami and entered the fight at full strength. Test the new guardian-warrior.
dmz.quest.android15.name: Hyperbolic Time Chamber
dmz.quest.android15.desc: The battlefield is getting out of control. Find the Time Chamber and prepare to push your limits.
dmz.quest.android16.name: Defend the City
dmz.quest.android16.desc: Cell is feeding on civilians and vanishing before anyone can stop him. Hunt him down and protect the city.
dmz.quest.android17.name: Stop the Absorption
dmz.quest.android17.desc: Cell is closing in on Android 18. Beat back both threats before he completes himself.
dmz.quest.android18.name: Semi-Perfect Cell
dmz.quest.android18.desc: Cell evolved anyway, and the fight only got worse. Stand against his new form before the situation spirals.
dmz.quest.android19.name: Pride of the Prince
dmz.quest.android19.desc: Vegeta has pushed past ordinary Super Saiyan power. Challenge the prince at his peak.
dmz.quest.android20.name: Future Warrior
dmz.quest.android20.desc: Future Trunks has climbed even higher in pursuit of Cell. Face him and see how far the future has changed him.
dmz.quest.android21.name: Perfect Cell
dmz.quest.android21.desc: Cell has achieved perfection. The Cell Games are coming, and the battlefield belongs to him now.
dmz.quest.android22.name: Prepare for the Cell Games
dmz.quest.android22.desc: Cell is waiting. Return to Kami's Lookout, regroup, and get ready for the tournament that decides Earth.
dmz.quest.android23.name: Gohan Steps Forward
dmz.quest.android23.desc: Gohan has the power to end this, but only if he can bring it out. Challenge him before the Cell Games erupt.
dmz.quest.android24.name: Cell Juniors
dmz.quest.android24.desc: Cell's children are tearing through the fighters. Destroy the first wave before the arena collapses.
dmz.quest.android25.name: Cell Juniors Again
dmz.quest.android25.desc: The swarm keeps coming. Clear the second wave and keep the remaining fighters alive.
dmz.quest.android26.name: Super Perfect Cell
dmz.quest.android26.desc: Cell has come back stronger than before. End the fight for good before he destroys everything left standing.
dmz.quest.android27.name: Sweep the Battlefield
dmz.quest.android27.desc: Even after Cell falls, his spawn and debris still threaten the area. Sweep the battlefield and finish the cleanup.
dmz.quest.android28.name: Post-Cell Training
dmz.quest.android28.desc: Peace returned, but the fighters cannot afford to go soft. Keep training until the next era begins.
dmz.quest.android29.name: Return to Kami's Lookout
dmz.quest.android29.desc: The battle is over, and the world needs a moment to breathe. Report back to Kami's Lookout.
dmz.quest.android30.name: World Peace Patrol
dmz.quest.android30.desc: Peace never lasts for long. Patrol the rocky badlands and crush the last organized raiders.
dmz.quest.android31.name: A Hidden Return
dmz.quest.android31.desc: Not every trace of Cell disappeared in the final clash. Face the hidden return of his perfect form.
dmz.quest.android32.name: Finish the Remnant
dmz.quest.android32.desc: One last remnant of Cell's power still lingers. Destroy it before the future repeats itself.
dmz.quest.android33.name: Pass the Torch
dmz.quest.android33.desc: The next generation has to carry the peace the old fighters bought. Visit Goku's house and close this chapter.
dmz.quest.android34.name: Ready for the Buu Era
dmz.quest.android34.desc: The Cell conflict is over. Return to Kami's Lookout and prepare for whatever the next era brings.
dmz.sidequest.roshi_basic.name: Roshi's Basic Training
dmz.sidequest.roshi_basic.desc: Master Roshi has agreed to train you, but first you must prove your worth. Find Kame House and show your combat skills.
dmz.sidequest.endurance.name: Endurance Training
dmz.sidequest.endurance.desc: Roshi says true warriors must fight all kinds of enemies. Prove your endurance against tougher foes.
dmz.sidequest.weighted.name: Weighted Training
dmz.sidequest.weighted.desc: It's time to train with weighted gear. Defeat powerful foes and gather materials for your training equipment.
dmz.sidequest.gravity.name: Gravity Chamber
dmz.sidequest.gravity.desc: You've earned access to intense gravity training. Venture into dangerous territory and prove you can handle extreme conditions.
dmz.sidequest.explorer.name: World Explorer
dmz.sidequest.explorer.desc: A warrior must know the land they protect. Explore the different biomes of the world.
dmz.sidequest.namek_explorer.name: Namek Explorer
dmz.sidequest.namek_explorer.desc: You've reached Namek! Explore this alien world and discover the villages of the Namekian people.
dmz.sidequest.sacred_lands.name: The Sacred Lands
dmz.sidequest.sacred_lands.desc: The Namekian elders speak of a sacred village hidden on this world. Find it and uncover its secrets.
dmz.sidequest.monster_hunter.name: Monster Hunter
dmz.sidequest.monster_hunter.desc: The world is filled with dangerous creatures. Prove yourself as a monster hunter by eliminating various threats.
dmz.sidequest.nether_warrior.name: Nether Warrior
dmz.sidequest.nether_warrior.desc: The Nether holds powerful enemies. Only a true warrior can survive its fiery depths.
dmz.sidequest.dball_hunter.name: Dragon Ball Guardian
dmz.sidequest.dball_hunter.desc: Bandits have learned about the Dragon Balls. Track down their outpost and put an end to their plans.
dmz.sidequest.krillin_sparring.name: Krillin's Sparring Match
dmz.sidequest.krillin_sparring.desc: Krillin wants a sparring partner to prepare for the incoming Saiyan threat. Show him you can hold your own against the local monsters.
dmz.sidequest.tien_mountain.name: Mountain Training
dmz.sidequest.tien_mountain.desc: Tien invites you to train in the harsh mountains. Only by facing powerful foes in extreme terrain can you prepare for the Saiyans.
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_survival.name: Wilderness Survival
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_survival.desc: Piccolo believes in training through pure survival. Venture into the forest and prove your combat skills against waves of hostile creatures.
dmz.sidequest.gohan_survival.name: Gohan's Survival Kit
dmz.sidequest.gohan_survival.desc: Piccolo left young Gohan alone in the wilderness to toughen him up. The boy could use some supplies €” bring him food and a weapon.
dmz.sidequest.vegeta_pride.name: Vegeta's Pride Training
dmz.sidequest.vegeta_pride.desc: Vegeta demands you keep up with his training regimen. Enter the Hyperbolic Time Chamber and fight the deadliest enemies to prove you're worthy of a Saiyan's respect.
dmz.sidequest.gohan_timechamber.name: Gohan's Time Chamber Training
dmz.sidequest.gohan_timechamber.desc: Gohan is training inside the Hyperbolic Time Chamber to unlock his hidden potential. Help him prepare by gathering supplies and clearing out phantom threats.
dmz.sidequest.krillin_scout.name: Namek Reconnaissance
dmz.sidequest.krillin_scout.desc: Krillin asks you to scout the Ajissa Plains for Frieza's forces. Find a Namekian village and clear out any soldiers lurking nearby.
dmz.sidequest.namek_farewell.name: Namek's Farewell
dmz.sidequest.namek_farewell.desc: Before Namek's fate is sealed, the Namekian Elder asks you to visit the Sacred Lands one last time and pay your respects to this dying world.
dmz.sidequest.trunks_warning.name: Trunks' Warning
dmz.sidequest.trunks_warning.desc: A mysterious warrior from the future warns you about the Android threat. Investigate Dr. Gero's laboratory to uncover his plans before it's too late.
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_kami.name: Piccolo's Resolve
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_kami.desc: Piccolo contemplates fusing with Kami to gain the power needed to fight the Androids. Visit Kami's Lookout and help him find the clarity he needs.
dmz.sidequest.yamcha_bandit.name: Desert Wolf's Grudge
dmz.sidequest.yamcha_bandit.desc: Yamcha's old desert hideout has been overrun by bandits. He asks you to clear them out €” for old times' sake.
dmz.sidequest.farmer_rr.name: Red Ribbon Remnants
dmz.sidequest.farmer_rr.desc: A local farmer reports that Red Ribbon Army remnants are raiding the countryside. Stop them before they cause more damage.
dmz.sidequest.elder_blessing.name: The Elder's Blessing
dmz.sidequest.elder_blessing.desc: The Namekian Elder needs proof that you stand against Frieza's tyranny. Defeat his soldiers to earn the Elder's trust and blessing.
dmz.sidequest.ginyu_warmup.name: Ginyu Force Warm-Up
dmz.sidequest.ginyu_warmup.desc: The Ginyu Force is coming. Goku asks you to train by clearing out Frieza's remaining soldiers on the Ajissa Plains €” you'll need every ounce of strength.
dmz.sidequest.krillin_patrol.name: Android Patrol
dmz.sidequest.krillin_patrol.desc: Krillin asks you to patrol the rocky wastelands for Android sightings. Clear out any Red Ribbon remnants you find along the way.
dmz.sidequest.tien_cell.name: Hunting Cell
dmz.sidequest.tien_cell.desc: Tien senses a dark energy spreading across the plains. Help him investigate by eliminating the creatures Cell has been absorbing from.
dmz.sidequest.videl_defense.name: City Defense
dmz.sidequest.videl_defense.desc: Cell Juniors are wreaking havoc everywhere! Videl asks for your help defending the innocent from these miniature terrors.
dmz.sidequest.chiaotzu_rescue.name: Chiaotzu's Rescue
dmz.sidequest.chiaotzu_rescue.desc: Chiaotzu went missing while training near a Nether portal. Tien is worried sick €” venture into the Nether, gather what you need, and bring his friend back safely.
dmz.sidequest.scholar_lore.name: Saiyan Legacy
dmz.sidequest.scholar_lore.desc: A scholar has heard rumors of alien technology on Earth. Investigate the crash site near Goku's home and the rocky wastelands where the Saiyans landed.
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_arrival.name: Piccolo's Arrival
dmz.sidequest.piccolo_arrival.desc: Piccolo has finally arrived on Planet Namek. He needs you to create a distraction by drawing out Frieza's soldiers while he powers up.
dmz.sidequest.goku_healing.name: Defending the Healing Pod
dmz.sidequest.goku_healing.desc: Goku is recovering in a healing pod after his battle with the Ginyu Force. Frieza's soldiers are closing in €” defend the area at all costs!
dmz.sidequest.chichi_worry.name: A Mother's Worry
dmz.sidequest.chichi_worry.desc: Chi-Chi is worried sick about Gohan fighting Cell. Bring her proof that her son is being well taken care of €” a weapon and some food should ease her mind.
dmz.sidequest.goku_farewell.name: Goku's Final Farewell
dmz.sidequest.goku_farewell.desc: With Cell defeated, Goku has one last wish €” visit Kami's Lookout together one more time. This may be the last chance to say goodbye.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar.name: Radar Upgrade
dmz.sidequest.bulma_radar.desc: Bulma needs specific materials to improve the Dragon Radar's range. Gather redstone, copper, and gold for her €” she'll make it worth your while.
dmz.sidequest.collect_dballs.name: Collect the Dragon Balls
dmz.sidequest.collect_dballs.desc: Bulma asks you to gather all seven Dragon Balls before the Saiyan threat escalates. Bring each one back safely.
dmz.sidequest.chichi_provisions.name: Provisions for Battle
dmz.sidequest.chichi_provisions.desc: Chi-Chi is preparing a feast for the warriors before the final battle against the Saiyans. Help her gather enough food to feed everyone.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_namek.name: Namekian Research
dmz.sidequest.bulma_namek.desc: Bulma is fascinated by Namekian technology. Collect Kikono shards and cloth from this alien world so she can study their unique properties.
dmz.sidequest.merchant_artifacts.name: Alien Artifacts
dmz.sidequest.merchant_artifacts.desc: A Traveling Merchant discovered rare alien materials on Namek. Retrieve Kikono shards and diamonds for him €” he promises a legendary weapon in return.
dmz.sidequest.gohan_namek_db.name: Race for the Dragon Balls
dmz.sidequest.gohan_namek_db.desc: Gohan is racing to collect the Namekian Dragon Balls before Frieza. Help him by visiting Guru and gathering Kikono shards to trade for information.
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gero.name: Gero's Blueprints
dmz.sidequest.bulma_gero.desc: Bulma needs data from Dr. Gero's laboratory to understand the Androids' weaknesses. Search the lab and bring back redstone circuits and Kikono components.
quest.dmz.party.invite.leader_only: §e[DMZ-Party]§r Only the party leader can invite players
quest.dmz.party.invite.same_party: §e[DMZ-Party]§r That player is already in your party
quest.dmz.party.invite.open_quest: §7Open your quest menu to accept or reject the invitation.
quest.dmz.party.invite.invalid: §e[DMZ-Party]§r That invitation is no longer valid
quest.dmz.party.reward.leader_only: §e[DMZ-Party]§r Only the party leader can claim shared quest rewards
quest.dmz.party.invite.self: §e[DMZ-Party]§r You cannot invite yourself to a party!
quest.dmz.party.invite.received: §e[DMZ-Party]§r You have been invited to join %s's party
quest.dmz.party.invite.accept.hover: Click to accept the party invitation
quest.dmz.party.invite.reject.hover: Click to reject the party invitation
quest.dmz.party.invite.none: §e[DMZ-Party]§r You have no pending party invitations
quest.dmz.party.leave.solo: §e[DMZ-Party]§r You are not in a party with other players
skill.dragonminez.fly.desc: Control your Ki to Fly! Jump and press the Fly Key mid-air to Fly, level up the skill to increase your speed.
skill.dragonminez.jump.desc: Let's you Jump higher. The more you level up, the higher you can jump.
skill.dragonminez.kisense.desc: Allows you to sense the ki of nearby entities, making it easier to locate them.
skill.dragonminez.kicontrol.desc: Learn to Control your Ki. It's a basic skill to use Ki Attacks.
skill.dragonminez.kimanipulation.desc: Master the Ki Manipulation to be able to create Ki Weapons, increasing your Melee Damage based on your Ki Damage!
skill.dragonminez.potentialunlock.desc: Let's you Unlock your real Potential to increase your power release to the limit!
skill.dragonminez.kaioken.desc: A powerful technique that multiplies your stats but strains your body.
skill.dragonminez.ultrainstinct.desc: An ultimate, divine technique that severs the connection between the mind and body, allowing the user to react, dodge, and attack automatically without conscious thought.
skill.dragonminez.ultraego.desc: It is a state of mind focused on selfishness, allowing the user to unleash limitless power the more they revel in destruction.
skill.dragonminez.meditation.desc: Boosts your Passive Ki Regeneration and Stamina Recovery.
skill.dragonminez.superform.desc: Access to powerful transformations unique to your race.
skill.dragonminez.godform.desc: Access to divine transformations with godly ki.
skill.dragonminez.legendaryforms.desc: Access to rare and legendary transformations.
skill.dragonminez.fusion.desc: Learn the Fusion technique to combine powers with another warrior.
skill.dragonminez.androidforms.desc: Access to powerful android transformations (exclusive for upgraded humans).
skill.dragonminez.racial_human.desc: Humans have a natural %d%% passive ki regeneration boost. This is doubled if you're an Android.
skill.dragonminez.racial_saiyan.desc: Upon staying 8 seconds below 15%% health, Saiyans will receive a Zenkai boost, which heals them by %d%% of their max health and increases their stats by a %d%%. This has a %d seconds cooldown.
skill.dragonminez.racial_namekian.desc: Namekians can assimilate with other Namekians by selecting the Skill on the X menu, then holding G next to a Namekian. When assimilating, you will regen %d%% of your max health, and will also gain a permanent %d%% (of your stats) boost to your stats.
skill.dragonminez.racial_frostdemon.desc: Frost Demons have prodigius strength, increasing their TP Gain ratio by %d%%. Stacking with other boosts like HTC.
skill.dragonminez.racial_bioandroid.desc: Bio-Androids can drain the life force of their enemies by selecting the skill on the X menu and pressing G, dealing %d%% of their max health as damage and healing themselves for the same amount. This has a %d seconds cooldown.
skill.dragonminez.racial_majin.desc: Majins can absorb other entities by selecting the skill on the X menu and pressing G. When absorbing, you will regen %d%% of your max health, and will also gain a permanent %d%% (of the target stats) boost to your stats.
advancements.dragonminez.root.title: DragonMine Z
advancements.dragonminez.root.descriptio: Thank you for downloading the Mod, hope you enjoy it!
advancements.dragonminez.invincible.desc: Obtain the Mark Grayson's Invincible suit.
advancements.dragonminez.kamilookout.des: Reach the Korin's Tower and Kami's Lookout near the Spawn.
advancements.dragonminez.gokuhouse.title: Mount Paozu
advancements.dragonminez.gokuhouse.descr: Reach the Goku's House in a Floating Island
advancements.dragonminez.roshihouse.desc: Reach the Kame House in a Floating Island
advancements.dragonminez.nimbus.title: For those with a Pure Heart
advancements.dragonminez.nimbus.descript: Mount into the Flying Nimbus obtained from Master Korin.
advancements.dragonminez.radar.title: Searching the Dragon Balls!
advancements.dragonminez.radar.descripti: Craft the Dragon Radar and start searching for the Dragon Balls.
advancements.dragonminez.dball1.title: The first Dragon Ball
advancements.dragonminez.dball7.title: Grant my Wish, Shenron!
advancements.dragonminez.dball7.descript: Find all the Dragon Balls and summon Shenron.
advancements.dragonminez.namekdim.title: A Planet full of Piccolos
advancements.dragonminez.namekdim.descri: Travel to the Planet Namek with a Saiyan Ship.
advancements.dragonminez.radarnamek.desc: Craft the Namekian Dragon Radar and start searching for the Namekian Dragon Balls.
advancements.dragonminez.namekballs.desc: Find all the Namekian Dragon Balls and summon Porunga.
advancements.dragonminez.kikono.title: Maleable Material?
advancements.dragonminez.kikono.descript: Find the Kikono Ore in the Namek Caves.
advancements.dragonminez.gete.title: Metal from the Big Star
advancements.dragonminez.gete.descriptio: Find the Gete Debris in the Big Star Gete.
advancements.dragonminez.armorstation.de: Craft the Armor Station and start crafting your own armor.
advancements.dragonminez.patternz.title: Your First Armor
advancements.dragonminez.patternz.descri: Craft the Blank Pattern (Z) and start crafting your own armor.
advancements.dragonminez.patternsuper.de: Craft the Blank Pattern (Super) and start crafting your own armor.
advancements.dragonminez.gokuarmor.title: The Saiyan born in Earth
advancements.dragonminez.gokuarmor.descr: Craft the Turtle Hermit School GI of Goku.
advancements.dragonminez.gotenarmor.desc: Craft the Turtle Hermit School GI of Goten.
advancements.dragonminez.greatsaiyamanar: Craft the Hero of Justice Armor of the Great Saiyaman.
advancements.dragonminez.futuregohanarmo: Craft the Turtle Hermit School GI of Future Gohan.
advancements.dragonminez.vegetaarmor.des: Craft the Saiyan Armor of Vegeta.
advancements.dragonminez.vegettoarmor.de: Craft the Inverted Turtle Hermit School GI of Vegito.
advancements.dragonminez.gogetaarmor.des: Craft the Metamoran Suit of Gogeta.
advancements.dragonminez.piccoloarmor.de: Craft the Demon GI of Piccolo.
advancements.dragonminez.demonbluegiarmo: Craft the Demon GI of Gohan.
advancements.dragonminez.bardockarmor.de: Craft the Saiyan Armor of Bardock (Z).
advancements.dragonminez.turlesarmor.des: Craft the Saiyan Armor of Turles.
advancements.dragonminez.tienarmor.title: The Tsuru-Sennin Student
advancements.dragonminez.tienarmor.descr: Craft the Crane School GI of Tien.
advancements.dragonminez.trunksarmor.des: Craft the Capsule Corp Jacket of Trunks (Z)
advancements.dragonminez.brolyarmor.desc: Craft the Saiyan Armor of Broly (Super).
advancements.dragonminez.shinarmor.title: The East Kaioshin
advancements.dragonminez.shinarmor.descr: Craft the Kaioshin Armor of Shin.
advancements.dragonminez.blackarmor.desc: Craft the Black Turtle Hermit School GI of Black Goku.
advancements.dragonminez.zamasuarmor.des: Craft the Kaioshin Armor of Zamasu.
advancements.dragonminez.fusionzamasuarm: Craft the Kaioshin Armor of Fusion Zamasu.
advancements.dragonminez.pridetroopsarmo: Craft the Pride Trooper Armor of U11.
advancements.dragonminez.hitarmor.title: The Infalible Assassin
advancements.dragonminez.hitarmor.descri: Craft the Assassin Armor of Hit.
advancements.dragonminez.gasarmor.title: The Heata Family
advancements.dragonminez.gasarmor.descri: Craft the Heata Family Armor of Gas.
advancements.dragonminez.majinbuuarmor.d: Craft the Majin Armor of Buu.
advancements.dragonminez.gammasarmor.des: Craft the Red Ribbon Armor of Gamma 1 § Gamma 2.
advancements.dragonminez.rockybiome.desc: Reach the Rocky Mountains Biome in the Overworld.
advancements.dragonminez.kaiosama.title: The North Kai
advancements.dragonminez.kaiosama.descri: Reach the King Kai's Planet in the Otherworld, crossing Snake Way.
advancements.dragonminez.patriarca.title: The Eldest Namek
advancements.dragonminez.patriarca.descr: Reach the Grand Elder Guru's House in Namek.
error.dmz.createcharacter: You must create your charactert first.
item.dragonminez.senzu_bean.cooldown: You must wait %s seconds before eating another Senzu Bean!
item.dragonminez.saiyan_ship.tooltip: §7This Ship from Saiyan Race can take you to other planets.
item.dragonminez.black_nimbus.tooltip: §7This cloud is only for those with a pure evil heart.
item.dragonminez.flying_nimbus.tooltip: §7This cloud is only for those with a pure heart.
item.dragonminez.namekdball_radar.toolti: §7Let's go catch the Namekian Dragon Balls!
item.dragonminez.might_tree_fruit.toolti: §7This fruit will give you a temporary power boost.
item.dragonminez.capsule.tooltip2: §7This capsule is used to increase your %s§7.
